visual_description: A woman with short brown hair, wearing a maroon collared shirt, is seen in a medium close-up, looking slightly to her right. She stands indoors, partially framed by a window with black mullions and a blurred background of shelves with bottles. Her posture is upright, and her gaze remains fixed off-camera.
